477 LTTL_INTRST_DSCHRG_CD LTTL_INTRST_DSCHRG_CD Mood: Little interest/pleasure doing things: P (D) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the patient expressed that in the last two weeks they found little interest or pleasure in doing things. 0 = No 
1 = Yes 
9 = No response 
- = Not Assessed/No Information
478 LTTL_INTRST_FREQ_ADMSN_CD LTTL_INTRST_FREQ_ADMSN_CD Mood: Little
